title: New Beginnings
description: Life moves forward. You've changed. The world notices.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Weeks pass. The workshop returns to its rhythms. You're different now—confident, aware of your strength.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Vera, you've been working on your own project all morning. What is it?

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: A repair kit. For you and Rainie. So if anything happens, I can fix you myself.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Someone has to carry it forward. And... I think I want to. Not the dangerous stuff. But the good things. The helpful things.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: A knock interrupts. The stranger from the train.

closing.speaker: Gentleman_paper
closing.text: You exposed the Order. You saved your father. And you showed that a girl and her companions could stand against forces much greater than themselves.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: I just did what I had to do.

closing.speaker: Gentleman_paper
closing.text: That's what heroes always say. I came to give you this.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: He hands you a brass token—a gear symbol.

closing.speaker: Gentleman_paper
closing.text: If you ever need help, or if others need your help, this will open doors. The underground protects its own.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Thank you. But... I hope I won't need it.

closing.speaker: Gentleman_paper
closing.text: *smiles* We always hope that, don't we? But the world keeps turning. And sometimes, it needs people like you.

choices.text: Accept the responsibility. Promise to help if needed.
Accept gratefully, but make it clear—family comes first.

puzzle.title: The Apprentice's First Work
puzzle.instructions: Wire the repair kit correctly. Show what you've learned.
